inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Search Query
inputs.description: Natural-language query to search the AethvionDB database.

inputs.name: database
inputs.label: Database
inputs.description: Wired database name — overrides the Database property. Connect a Global Database node here.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Results (JSON)
outputs.description: Array of matching entities with scores and metadata.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the search failed.
